data.title: ‘We're duplicating real life’: 2B3D CEO says Sui-powered metaverse will redefine gaming and commerce
data.description:
2B3D CEO Rob Bell reveals plans to build a hyper-realistic metaverse powered by the Sui blockchain, blending gaming, commerce, and AI — with NFL stars managing virtual football teams in a new game called Astro Bowl.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/innovation/were-duplicating-real-life-2b3d-ceo-says

data.title: Binance Helps Countries Plan Bitcoin Reserves
data.description:
Crypto exchange Binance is collaborating with governments to shape their crypto policies. A new report by the Financial Times states that several countries have shown interest in Bitcoin reserves and have sought Binance’s advice. The company’s CEO, Richard Teng, shared that governments and sovereign wealth funds are asking for advice
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/binance-helps-countries-plan-bitcoin-reserves/

data.title: Shiba Inu Chart Signals Bullish Trend, Analyst Predicts Surge
data.description:
A technical pattern on the Shiba Inu chart this week has drawn the attention of cryptocurrency analysts, with one suggesting it could signal significant price gains for the widely followed digital asset. Bullish Divergence Emerges on Shiba Inu Chart Jason Marks (@JavonTM1 on X), publishing analysis on the social media platform X, identified what is known in technical analysis circles as a regular bullish divergence. This type of signal is sometimes interpreted by traders as an indicator of potential upward price movement in the near future. “$SHIB (Shiba Inu) right there along with a Regular Bullish Divergence as well! BY The post Shiba Inu Chart Signals Bullish Trend, Analyst Predicts Surge first appeared on The Shib Daily
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/04/18/shiba-inu-chart-signals-bullish-trend-analyst-predicts-surge/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=shiba-inu-chart-signals-bullish-trend-analyst-predicts-surge

data.title: MoonPay CEO calls on Congress to keep state authority over stablecoins
data.description:
Ivan Soto-Wright, CEO of cryptocurrency payment firm MoonPay, is calling on US lawmakers to leave a path open to state-level regulators when passing legislation on stablecoins. In an April 18 X post, Soto-Wright said he wanted Congress to “keep state-regulated issuers in the game” when it comes to stablecoin regulation, referencing efforts in the House of Representatives and Senate to create a federal regulatory framework. Lawmakers are considering whether to pass the Guiding and Establishing National Innovation for US Stablecoins, or GENIUS Act, in the Senate and the Stablecoin Transparency and Accountability for a Better Ledger Economy, or STABLE Act, in the House. “While the cryptocurrency industry has called for federal legislation for years, it has been these state regulators who have provided and continue to provide regulatory clarity and supervision to ensure consumer protection and enable growth in the sector,” said Soto-Wright
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/moonpay-ceo-congress-stablecoin-bills?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bybit Backs Vietnam’s Crypto Trading Pilot with Tech and Risk Support
data.description:
Vietnam’s Ministry of Finance is partnering with Bybit to launch a pilot regulated crypto trading platform, aiming to enhance transparency, investor protection, and risk management in one of the world’s most active digital asset markets.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bybit-backs-vietnams-crypto-trading-pilot-with-tech-and-risk-support/
